title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Books Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Books Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Landmark Books Advisory Limited in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books Advisory Limited:
Landmark Books Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books Advisory Limited!
